case_title: FILLMORE APARTMENTS, L.L.C. vs. SCHULKE, ROGER et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE APARTMENTS, L.L.C. AS TO DEFENDANT SCHULKE, ROGER NOONAN, CATHERINE S. DOES I THROUGH V, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE APARTMENTS, L.L.C. DEFAULT OF MAR-30-1998 SET ASIDE, JUDGMENT OF APR-02-1998 SET ASIDE
